control.F: Does not prove pointwise-to-Abel replacement for localized NS stretching or any Clay claim.
control.L: shell samples -> diagonal/offdiag means -> Abel windows -> good/bad classification
control.O: Local NS A6 pointwise-to-Abel averaging proxy diagnostic.
control.P: LLN-like arcsine-neutral profiles should average small; correlated profile should fail visibly.
control.R: Simulate diagonal lambda*(2*kappa^2-1), off-diagonal terms, and Abel shell averages.
control.S: Synthetic shell model only; no PDE Abel LLN or leakage identity is proved.

interpretation.bad_profile_meaning: The correlated profile biases kappa^2 above 1/2 and adds positive off-diagonal drift, so Abel averaging does not remove the pointwise stretching proxy.
interpretation.good_profile_meaning: Arcsine-neutral kappa samples make lambda*(2*kappa^2-1) shell means small, and centered off-diagonal terms stay within a 1/sqrt(window*samples) proxy scale.
interpretation.non_claims: No localized Leray commutator estimate, shell mixing theorem, compensated leakage identity, NS Clay result, YM result, or terminal unification is proved.

profiles.description: Arcsine-neutral kappa grid with exactly centered off-diagonal shell noise.
profiles.name: lln_exact_arcsine_centered

profiles.description: Stratified arcsine samples with shell-dependent jitter and centered off-diagonal noise.
profiles.name: lln_jittered_arcsine_centered

profiles.description: Deliberately bad profile: kappa^2 is biased above 1/2 and off-diagonal drift is positive.
profiles.name: bad_correlated_positive_bias
